expected_effect: Preserve the raw anti-arb improvement of the best apr18 anchors while letting neutral or replenishing flow see cheaper quotes only when imbalance scaled by local depth says the calm path is genuinely safe.
expected_failure_signature: If imbalance normalization is too noisy or permissive, quote_selectivity collapses, arb_loss_to_retail_gain drifts back toward the baseline, and the branch replays cheap-mode adverse selection.
expected_win_condition: Clear the promotion margin by matching the apr18 raw anchors on arb discipline while reducing unnecessary neutral-path fee spend enough to lift official screen incumbent performance above 480.
hidden_coupling_removed: Quote relief should not inherit the same blended path that advertises or subsidizes inventory and continuation protection; the router should decide from imbalance and depth whether neutral quoting is safe at all.
rationale: Use the screen_0008 fair-mid anchor and the screen_0006 raw refill evidence as context, but route quoting from depth-normalized order flow imbalance so adverse-selection protection and benign recenter relief are no longer blended through the same continuous surface.
title: Depth-normalized imbalance router
why_not_coefficient_retune: This replaces the blended replay/router family with a new depth-normalized lane-selection contract instead of reweighting the same quote channels.
